Class NodeImpl<T extends Node, S extends OMNode>

java.lang.Object
org.apache.axis2.saaj.ProxyNode<T,S>
org.apache.axis2.saaj.NodeImpl<T,S>
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.xml.soap.Node, Node
Direct Known Subclasses:
SOAPElementImpl, TextImplEx
public abstract class NodeImpl<T extends Node, S extends OMNode> extends ProxyNode<T,S> implements jakarta.xml.soap.Node
